summary: Comprehensive testing of SDM Platform features completed. Backend: 100% success (19/19 tests passed). Frontend: All flows working correctly. Admin SDM Config Panel, Client Cards tab, and Merchant Cards management all functional.

issues: Minor HTML hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <tbody> - needs React fragment or conditional rendering fix in lines 307-310

passed_tests: GET /api/sdm/admin/config - Returns SDM platform configuration with all required fields
PUT /api/sdm/admin/config - Successfully updates configuration values
GET /api/sdm/admin/sdm-stats - Returns complete platform statistics (users, merchants, transactions, memberships)
GET /api/sdm/admin/memberships - Returns list of all memberships
GET /api/sdm/admin/memberships?status=active - Filter by status works correctly
GET /api/sdm/admin/card-types - Returns all merchant card types
POST /api/sdm/merchant/card-types - Creates new card type successfully
GET /api/sdm/merchant/card-types - Returns merchant's card types
PUT /api/sdm/merchant/card-types/{id} - Updates card type
DELETE /api/sdm/merchant/card-types/{id} - Soft deletes (deactivates) card type
GET /api/sdm/merchant/memberships - Returns merchant's active members
GET /api/sdm/user/available-cards - Returns purchasable cards from verified merchants
GET /api/sdm/user/memberships - Returns user's membership cards
POST /api/sdm/user/purchase-membership - Handles insufficient balance correctly (400)
POST /api/sdm/user/purchase-membership - Handles invalid card type (404)
POST /api/sdm/auth/send-otp - Sends OTP with debug code for testing
POST /api/sdm/auth/send-otp - Validates referral codes correctly
POST /api/sdm/auth/verify-otp - Rejects invalid OTP codes
PUT /api/sdm/admin/merchants/{id}/verify - Verifies merchant successfully
Admin SDM Platform Panel - Overview tab shows statistics (4 users, 2 transactions, GHS 7.35 cashback)
Admin SDM Platform Panel - Configuration tab shows all settings with editable inputs
Admin SDM Platform Panel - Memberships tab shows table (currently empty)
Admin SDM Platform Panel - Card Types tab shows TEST_ card types from backend tests
SDM Client Login - Phone input and OTP verification flow works
SDM Client Dashboard - Cards tab shows available membership cards
SDM Client Dashboard - My QR tab shows QR code with copy functionality
SDM Client Dashboard - Invite tab shows referral code and share options
SDM Merchant Registration - Form submission creates merchant account
SDM Merchant Dashboard - Cards tab shows 'New Card Type' button and form
critical_code_review_comments: SDMConfigPanel.jsx line 307-310: Conditional rendering in table body causes hydration warning - wrap empty state in React fragment
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix during automated testing: TEST_Merchant_*, TEST_VIP_Card_*, TEST_Update_Card_*, TEST_Delete_Card_*, TEST_Purchase_Card_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: SDM Platform fully tested. All admin config, stats, memberships, and card-types APIs working. User membership purchase requires merchant verification first. Mobile Money payment is MOCKED (Hubtel integration pending).

mocked_integrations.Mobile Money Payment (Hubtel): Payment via mobile_money simulated - actual Hubtel integration not yet implemented
